hook_strength.description: First 150 chars scroll-stopping power. Curiosity gap, specific number, bold claim, or emotional trigger.

save_worthiness.description: Bookmark-worthy? Framework, checklist, data, reference value. Saves = 5x reach of a like.

comment_worthiness.description: Debate potential, experience-sharing CTA, contrarian angle. Comments = 15x a like.

dwell_time_potential.description: Read time, progressive revelation, content density, formatting for mobile scanning.

voice_authenticity.description: Matches voice_profile.md. Passes 360Brew AI detection. High lexical diversity.

algorithm_compliance.description: No external links, no engagement bait, Topic DNA aligned, optimal length for format.

weight_history.reason: Initial weights based on LinkedIn 2026 algorithm research. Saves boosted to 0.25 (from 0.15 in SYSTEM_DESIGN.md) based on 2026 data showing saves are the #1 ranking signal.
